title: Sports
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Giannis rusty but 'just happy that I'm out there'
items.description: Bucks star Giannis Antetokounmpo returned Monday night against the Celtics, his first game in more than five weeks after straining his right calf.

items.title: Transfer rumors, news: Bruno Fernandes plans Man United future talks
items.description: Bruno Fernandes has shown no signs of wanting to leave Manchester United, while Casemiro has urged the club to sign Bruno Guimarães. Transfer Talk has...

items.title: Arizona wins Big 12; Lloyd calls out 'soft' narrative
items.description: No. 2 Arizona clinched the outright Big 12 regular-season title with a 73-57 win over No. 6 Iowa State on Monday night.

items.title: Trae tossed from bench ahead of Wizards debut
items.description: Trae Young, who is set to make his Wizards debut Thursday vs. Utah, was ejected for leaving the bench in Monday's loss to Houston.

items.title: Boozer, Duke 'show fight' in securing ACC title
items.description: Star freshman Cameron Boozer and top-ranked Duke overwhelmed NC State on Monday night to clinch the outright ACC regular-season title.
